original:
Location: Some God-forsaken Rock on the Askonia Fringe
Date: 198.05.17

We had a deal. 

In a dusty no-good bar on Asharu I met the miner with the metal eye. He winked and sold me twelve containers of low-grade ferrous ore hiding four hundred thirty two CP-carbines with enough ammunition to fuel a small insurgency for an entire muggy Volturn summer season. The next step was a rendevous with Moon "High Rad" Salazar. Moon flies a Mule past Diktat patrols but never seems to get out of owing someone a lot of something. Reactor plating was always a bit thin, if you catch my meaning.

I'm paid to ship cargo, not ask questions. But I gotta ask why's Moon saying she's not going to pay for this job, that 'You might as well hand over the cargo now because no one needs to die for a shipment of hot guns'.

Now, I weren't the one to broach this question of who's dying for what out here, but now that's on the table being asked and I've got to provide her a good answer.


I ping my Second with the go-code and flip the safeties. Fifty klicks away, the scope shows Moon's engines bloom with gamma radiation as she maneuvers to an attack vector.
translation:
地点: Askonia 外围的遗弃之地
日期: 198.05.17

我们有活要干了。

在 Asharu 尘土飞扬的糟糕酒吧里，我遇到一名有着金属义眼的矿工。他挤着眼向我兜售了 12 箱劣质铁矿，里面混有 432 支 CP-卡宾枪 和足够在 Volturn 闷热的夏季中来一场小骚乱的弹药。下一步则是和一个绰号叫 "High Rad"(高辐射) 的家伙，Moon Salazar 碰头。Moon 的骡子总是能通过 辛达强权 的巡逻检查，而且也从来没见她欠过谁一大笔货什么的。谁叫反应堆的舱壁就这么薄嘛，你懂我的意思。

我之前只管运货拿钱，绝不多嘴。但这次我得和 Moon 礼貌谈谈这次她为啥不想付钱了，再解释下什么叫 "现在你现在最好他妈的把货物也交出来，毕竟没人想为了一批赃枪送命。"

虽然 "谁会为了什么送命" 这问题不是我先挑起来的，但既然这问题已经上了台面，那我不得不好好地回答她了。


我示意副手开始行动，同时解除了火控保险。瞄准器里五十星里之外 Moon 引擎闪着伽马射线亮了起来，看来她开始机动进入了攻击航路。
context:
版本：0.98-RC8 词条格式：v2
源文件：data\missions\afistfulofcredits\mission_text.txt

original:
Location: Outskirts of the Valhalla system
Date: 189.08.20

Hit and run attacks by Tri-Tachyon raider squadrons and certain of the more trusted mercenary captains bleed Hegemony resources throughout the Second AI War. The entire situation has become an embarrassment to the commanding Space Marshal -- while every proper fleet battle thus far has been won, the Hegemony Navy has been forced to abandon captured stations and even withdraw from entire planets as the supply convoys are harried, scattered, and plundered by Tri-Tachyon raiders. 

A ceasefire has been called after the Hanan Pacha atrocity which saw the deployment of forbidden planet-killer weapons, an act for which neither side claims responsibility and each claims was carried out by the other. While the politicians and diplomats shout accusations, the Hegemony quietly shores up its tenuous logistical situation and Tri-Tachyon deniably raids Hegemony convoys using piratical mercenaries.

The pirates, however, are untrustworthy. They only offer at best a middling chance that they will even carry out their contracted missions. When the Tri-Tachyon Strategic Modeler (TSM) requires guaranteed results to ensure future contingencies, the Company deploys phase ships from their hidden arsenal-laboratories.

As a young and ambitious executive keen to advance through Operations, you captain the Doom-class Phase Strike Cruiser at the head of a small task force. The lack of input to the TSM after the Hegemony bricked its own hyperwave communication system has led to increased variance in its Tactical Result Estimations (TREs), and it turns out that this is no convoy. This is something new: a counter-raider patrol, a hammer of fighters and converted civilian auxiliaries ready to pummel your task force on the anvil of an Enforcer-class Assault Destroyer.

If you manage to beat them, you may yet show your merit and make Vice Fleet Director. If not, then at least no one will ever question the surety of your ambition and your devotion to the Company.
translation:
地点: Valhalla 星系外郊
日期: 189.08.20

在第二次 AI 战争期间，三一速子科技 的掠夺中队伙同某些深受其信赖的佣兵舰长，持续用打了就跑的劫掠战术削弱 霸主 的作战资源。对于当时就任指挥职位的宇宙元帅而言，整体战局已然演变成了一场尴尬的羞辱 —— 尽管能在正面的舰队决战中大获全胜，但由于补给运输舰队不断遭到 速子科技 掠夺舰队的骚扰、分隔、哄抢，霸主 海军总是被迫放弃刚拿下的空间站，甚至不得不从整个殖民星上撤离。

Hanan Pacha 的星球灭绝事件发生后，冲突双方暂时达成了停火。而对事件中动用行星杀手武器这一行径，双方都坚称是对方所为，拒不为之负责。不过正当政治家和外交官在相互大声斥责之时，霸主 趁机默默地巩固它脆弱的补给线；而速子科技则一边矢口否认，一边继续雇佣海盗佣兵袭击 霸主 的运输船队。

然而，海盗完全不可信，他们能履约执行任务的概率充其量也就五五开。每当 速子科技 战略运筹器 (TSM) 需要用万无一失的战果确保未来的局势发展时，公司就会从他们的隐蔽军火实验室部署相位舰船。

作为一名野心勃勃，渴望在行动部出人头地的年轻高管，你正亲自指挥一艘 厄运-级 相位强袭巡洋舰，率领一支小型特混编队开展行动。在 霸主 把他们的超空间通讯系统亲自砖掉了之后，由于缺乏有效数据输入，战略运筹器产生的战术预估报告 (TRE) 偏差越来越大，导致你发现自己的对手并不是预料中的运输船队。这是某种被称为反袭扰巡逻队的新编制，正打算用一艘 执法者-级 突击驱逐舰作为铁砧死死咬住你，再由改装民用辅助舰船支持战机联队组成重锤，将你的特混编队彻底粉碎。

倘若你能设法击败他们，那你就还有机会展示自己的绩效，争取晋升为舰队副指挥。就算失败了，至少往后再也不会有任何人能质疑你的雄心壮志和对公司的满腔奉献。
context:
版本：0.98-RC8 词条格式：v2
源文件：data\missions\ambush\mission_text.txt

original:
Location: Inside the Coral Nebula, outskirts of the Zagan system.
Date: 153.08.12

The world of Mazalot, locus of power in the Zagan system, was a weak link in the independent-minded Persean League's great arc of loosely allied polities across the Sector. The Luddic demographic majority was long relegated to the status of second class citizens; churches were raided, religious leaders harassed, and laws discriminatorily enforced.

The Persean League was founded upon the principle of non-intervention in internal affairs of member-polities. So while the old regime of Mazalot was corrupt and coarse in its exploitation, earning itself few true friends in the League, it staggered onward. All the League demands of each world is for its due be paid in ships, credits, or recruits. The collapse of one or another economic bubble saw the Mazalotian regime draw from its most plentiful - and freely spent - resource by enacting a sweeping conscription program. Those who could afford the bribes or were otherwise attached to the ruling party could avoid conscription. The Luddic faithful, meanwhile, saw the cream of their youth used as fodder in the long-simmering conflict with the Hegemony, returning home broken, bitter, or never at all. 

The inevitable upsurge in Luddic Path activity provoked a crackdown, and that was the end of what the faithful would allow: revolution exploded from the plantation provinces and the ghetto-arcologies and orbiting factories, out across the entire Zagan system, toppling the old regime like a rotten stump.

The newly installed Luddic theocracy, an uneasy collection of guerilla fighters and Church authorities, refused to pay the League's bloody due. The League threatened intervention -- and to this the Knights of Ludd responded. The Knights are the sworn defenders of the Luddic faith, and though it stretched them to their limit, they sent a fleet to defend the new dawning on Mazalot.

***

The Persean League world of Kazeron always pays its dues in warships and highly trained officers to command them. Navarch Mars Kato is one such officer who leads the task force sent to deal with the renegation of Mazalot. In all other matters, the League does not intervene, but one does not simply abandon the League without the League's permission. Navarch Kato's fleet is small, if nimble, for he is expected to maintain a loose blockade to pressure the Knight's resupply fleets until additional League forces can be assigned from Hegemony-threatened space. 

Glory, however, is not seized by the meek: Weeks of taunting raids have drawn the Knights of Ludd into a trap set in the Coral Nebula, at edge of the Zagan system. There the strength and pride of Kato's task force, the Astral-class carrier "Sirocco" with a full complement of fighters, has lain quietly in wait. Although the Knights' fleet has much greater firepower, most craft are large and the League advantage in strike fighters should be decisive.
translation:
地点: 珊瑚星云内 Zagan 星系外郊
日期: 153.8.12

Mazalot 是 Zagan 星系的权力中枢。但对横跨星域标榜独立的 英仙座联盟 来说，Mazalot 则是其结盟政体松散关系纽带中的一个薄弱环节。长期以来，占人口大多数的卢德信徒一直处于二等公民的地位，教会遭到搜查，宗教领袖受到骚扰，执法也充满了歧视。

作为成立的基础，英仙座联盟 原则上不干预成员内部事务。因此尽管 Mazalot 的旧政权腐败不堪、肆意剥削，在联盟中也没什么真正的盟友，但它依旧能够踉跄地维持下去。联盟向各成员星要求的唯一义务，便是以舰船、货币或兵员的形式足额上缴会费。随着众多泡沫经济的相继崩溃，Mazalotian 政权不得不将目光放到了它最庞大且可自由挥霍的人口资源上，发起了全面的征兵计划。那些付得起贿赂或在执政党里有关系的人可以免于被征召。而与此同时，卢德信徒们只能看着自己的青年才俊作为炮灰被送去与 霸主 长期对峙，归来的只有残躯败体，或是再也等不到的音讯。

随后 卢德左径 活动的必然激增引发了的当局强烈的镇压，这彻底击穿了信徒们的底线。革命爆发式地席卷了各个种植园、贫民生态建筑和轨道船坞，蔓延到了整个 Zagan 星系，而旧政权也如摧枯拉朽一般的被推翻在地。

由游击队战士和教会领袖仓促组成卢德神权统治政体才刚成立，就拒绝向联盟继续上贡染血的会费。联盟以武力介入威胁他们，而卢德骑士团则作出强硬回应。这些骑士宣誓将誓死捍卫卢德信仰，尽管现状超出了可应对的极限，但他们还是派出了舰队以捍卫 Mazalot 的新生曙光。

***

英仙座联盟 的 Kazeron 向来都用精英军官和他们麾下的战舰作为会费上缴联盟。而海军都统 Mars Kato 就是其中之一，此行将由他来处理 Mazalot 叛乱事件。尽管联盟从不过问其他任何事务，但成员像这样擅自脱离联盟，联盟不会坐视不管。海军都统 Kato 的舰队小而精干，毕竟计划中他只需要维持一些松散的封锁，来给卢德骑士团补给舰队施压，直到更多的联盟战力能从受 霸主 威胁的星区中调拨过来。

然而，光荣事迹可不会是这种怯懦的庸人之举：接连数周的挑衅式劫掠把卢德骑士团一头引入了张开在 Zagan 星系边缘珊瑚星云的陷阱。坐镇其中的是 Kato 的实力与骄傲，星体-级 航母 Sirocco 号和它完备的战机编队正静静地等候着猎物。面对卢德骑士的舰队拥有的更强火力和更大舰船，联盟的打击战机群优势成为了左右战局的关键。
context:
版本：0.98-RC8 词条格式：v2
源文件：data\missions\coralnebula\mission_text.txt

original:
Location: In orbit around Raesvelg in the Valhalla system
Date: 190.04.12

The Hegemony mining outpost of Raesvelg in the Valhalla system is blockaded by the Tri-Tachyon Corporation in the midst of the Second AI War. The local Hegemony system fleet has orders to prioritize defense of the military complex orbiting Valhalla's secondary, the dwarf star of Ragnar, leaving the populated moon of the gas giant Yggdrasil vulnerable to Tri-Tachyon attack. 

Raesvelg's ground-based defenses are strong and difficult to target, hidden as they are among the many derelict hab-domes and cold refineries. With the fragile hydroponics farms bombarded to uselessness from long range and the regular convoys from Jangala cut off, the Hegemony garrison is running low on supplies and is even having difficulty controlling the increasingly panicked civilian population. Raesvelg may be forced to surrender if not relieved.

The Hegemony-appointed magistrate, Gan Bowen, has used several emergency bonds backed by refining futures to raise an auxiliary supply fleet to slip through the Tri-Tachyon blockade. He has also used his newly-granted power to commission privateers to find mercenaries to protect the supply fleet in their desperate mission. The lead mercenary ship is the newly recommissioned ISS Black Star, a Hammerhead class destroyer fitted out as a favour to Magistrate Bowen by the heir of House Rao of Eventide - who, anyway, needed to find an opportunity for advancement for a third-born son who had got himself dishonourably dismissed from the Sphinx naval academy. 

If enough supply ships can punch through the blockade, Raesvelg can hold out until the naval task force from Samarra arrives to drive off the imperious Tri-Tachyon executives and their piratical minions. And if the ISS Black Star survives, Orcus Rao may yet distinguish himself enough to win back his naval career. The war is on and this is no peace-time navy of politicians and bureaucrats; the Hegemony needs officers as ruthless as they are ambitious.

* * * 

Excerpt from "In The Midst Of The Storm":

"Whether the appalling cost of the victory, the complete inversion of his mission orders, or the act of commandeering a Hegemony cruiser from its CO in the midst of combat, any one of Orcus Rao's actions during the breaking of the siege of Raesvelg would have earned a court-martial had he been within the Hegemony chain of command."
translation:
地点: Valhalla 星系，Raesvelg 的轨道附近
日期: 190.04.12

第二次 AI 战争期间，霸主 位于 Valhalla 星系的 Raesvelg 采矿基地遭到了 三一速子科技公司 的封锁。当地的星系舰队奉命优先防御位于 Valhalla 伴星 Ragnar 轨道上的军事复合体，使得这颗位于气态巨星 Yggdrasil 轨道上人口稠密的卫星完全暴露在 速子科技 的袭击威胁之下。

所幸，Raesvelg 的地面防御设施很强大，且大多隐藏在废弃的居住穹顶和沉寂的精炼厂中，难以被锁定。但是，由于脆弱的水培农场已经被远程轰炸摧毁殆尽，来自 Jangala 定期船队运输也被完全切断，导致 霸主 当地驻军的补给严重不足，甚至开始难以控制日益惊慌失措的平民。如果情况无法得到改善，Raesvelg 恐怕就要被迫投降。

霸主 任命的治安官 Gan Bowen 以精炼期货为担保筹集了数笔紧急债券，拼凑出一支辅助补给舰队，试图穿过 速子科技 的封锁。他还动用新获得的权力签署了私掠特许状，组织愿意卖命的雇佣军为这次孤注一掷的任务提供护航。领头的佣兵旗舰是一艘新近重新服役的 锤头-级 驱逐舰，ISS Black Star 号。这艘舰船由 Eventide 军官团之中的 Rao 家继承人出资改装，权当是向治安官 Bowen 卖个人情。这位继承人正在想尽办法，给家里那个刚被 Sphinx 海军学院开除军籍的三儿子找个出人头地的机会。

只要有足够数量的补给船能够冲破封锁，Raesvelg 就能坚持到 Samarra 的海军特勤舰队赶来，赶走这些飞扬跋扈的速子高管和他们的海盗喽啰。而如果 ISS Black Star 能挺过战火，Orcus Rao 或许就能靠立下的赫赫战功重返海军生涯。现在是战争时期，海军可容不下和平时期的政客和官僚，霸主 只需要冷酷无情且野心勃勃的军官。

***

摘录于 [风暴之中]：

"为了获胜不惜付出惨烈的代价；公然违抗作战指令；在激战中强夺 霸主 巡洋舰的指挥权 —— 倘若身处霸主指挥体系，Orcus Rao 在 Raesvelg 突围战役中的任何一条所作所为都足以将其送上军事法庭。"
context:
版本：0.98-RC8 词条格式：v2
源文件：data\missions\direstraits\mission_text.txt

original:
Location: Near the Aztlan inner system jump point
Date: 194.01.07

At the turn of Cycle 194, the Tri-Tachyon corporation attempted a direct attack on the Hegemony industrial core world of Chicomoztoc. It is unclear to Hegemony command what exactly compelled this radical change of strategy but it must be connected to the unexpected voting out of CEO Artemisia Sun - seemingly at the height of success and personal power over the megacorporation - by a previously unknown fraction within the Tri-Tachyon directorate. 

The gambit to commit to a decisive battle was a shocking change from the hit and run tactics that Tri-Tach had employed to bleed the Hegemony white up until this point, but the Hegemony managed to hastily assemble a fleet of overwhelming massed firepower through the emergency commissioning of civilian ships, both on the official auxiliary lists and off.

Though the cost in tonnage and manpower was terrifying, the Hegemony Navy emerged victorious from the meatgrinder affair that was to be named the Second Battle of Chicomoztoc. Scores of veteran captains were lost, leaving huge gaps in the Hegemony officer corps. But in their final hours, new heroes of the Hegemony were tested and forged - from the previously disgraced Orcus Rao, to Ardis Soloman (who had not yet earned her infamy), to the son of Chicomoztoc and future space marshal himself, Baikal Daud.

To cover their retreat, Vice Fleet Director Kader - in command of the surviving Tri-Tachyon forces after the destruction of the flagship - ordered a rear-guard action by a single Paragon-class battleship, the TTS Invincible. She would later receive a harsh sentence from the review board for "avoidable loss of corporate assets". However it must be noted that her decision forestalled complete disaster and allowed the megacorporation to withdraw the remainder of the fleet to hyperspace, including the phase cruiser transporting the planet-killer device. Though the war was lost, enough Tri-Tachyon spacepower was saved that a conditional surrender could be negotiated in the Treaty of Crom Cruach which allowed the megacorporation to remain a power in the Sector.
translation:
地点: Aztlan 星系内部跳跃点附近
日期: 194.01.07

星历 194 年伊始，三一速子科技 试图对 霸主 的工业核心星球 Chicomoztoc 发动正面攻击。直到现在，霸主 指挥部仍不清楚促成了这一激进的战略转变的具体原因，但这应该和 Artemisia Sun 的 CEO 职位被意外被投票罢免脱不了关系。当时她正凭借处于事业巅峰的的威望和个人影响力掌控着这家巨型公司，却突然被速子理事会里某个鲜为人知的内部派系投票罢免了。

在这之前，速子科技 一直采用打了就跑的游击战术来牵制消耗 霸主，而这次贸然选择进行正面对决，着实是个令人震惊的转变。尽管如此， 霸主 通过无差别紧急征用官方辅助名册内外的民用船只，匆忙组建起了一支压倒性火力的舰队扳回了一局。

尽管舰队遭受巨量的吨位与人员损失，霸主 在这场被称为 第二次 Chicomoztoc 战役 的绞肉战中中艰难取胜。由于大量老将牺牲，导致 霸主 军官阶层出现了巨大的断层。但在最后的生死关头，霸主 新生代的英雄们经受住了考验，脱颖而出 —— 从之前开除军籍的 Orcus Rao，到当时风评尚好的 Ardis Soloman，再到 Chicomoztoc 之子，未来的太空元帅本人，Baikal Daud。

旗舰被毁后，接管了残存部队指挥权的舰队副指挥 Kader 为了掩护撤退，下令让一艘 典范-级 战列舰 TTS Invincible 号独自留下断后。尽管后来她因 "导致公司资产遭受原本可避免的损失" 受到了审查委员会的严厉判罚，但必须指出的是，她的决定阻止了舰队惨遭灭顶之灾，成功地确保了剩余的公司舰队撤回超空间，其中就包括那艘运载着 行星杀手 的相位巡洋舰。尽管战争最终失败，但 速子科技 仍通过这次撤退确保了足够太空战力，为最终达成有条件投降的 Crom Cruach 条约的谈判中争取到了足够的余地，让 速子科技 公司在这片星域中继续保持着一席之地。
context:
版本：0.98-RC8 词条格式：v2
源文件：data\missions\forlornhope\mission_text.txt

original:
Location: Near some dismal world in the Duzakh system
Date: 204.01.22

Everyone has their price.

The effort to track down the leader of the Luddic Path cell operating in the Corvus-Magec-Askonia volume turned into fruitless weeks of bribing minor Diktat officials for dead-ends and strong-arming know-nothing low-life black market contacts. Then out of nowhere in low orbit around Nortia came a transmission for the captain of the ISS Black Star from one Brother Cotton, "a humble traveler on the Path of Ludd". A meeting was arranged.

The price was right. The ISS Black Star finds itself aligned with a former enemy; such is the life of a mercenary captain. A wealthy one, anyway.

The Path has learned that the PLS Praxis is transporting a prominent researcher from the League-world of Salamanca to a secret rendezvous where his contract will be sold to a Tri-Tachyon executive. The Path can not pass this opportunity to strike a blow against Mammon.

The ISS Black Star, accompanied by a small Luddic Path strike force, has difficulty following the daring hyperspace route of the Praxis and encounters the enemy force just as the transfer is taking place near the planet Druj in the Duzakh system.
translation:
地点: Duzakh 的凄凉世界附近
日期: 204.01.22

人人都能给自己开个价。

在 Corvus - Magec - Askonia 三角区域里追查 卢德左径 线索的行动变成了数周的白打工。辛达强权 的芝麻官收了贿赂，却只吐出来一堆查不下去的死胡同；混黑市的底层线人什么都不知道，却平白挨了几顿胖揍。就在一筹莫展之际， ISS Black Star 号在 Nortia 的低轨道上凭空收到了打给的舰长通讯请求，来讯者正是那个自称 "卢德之径上谦逊的旅者" 的 Cotton 修士。于是一场会面很快就安排妥了。

开价很够意思。ISS Black Star 号发现自己就这样和昔日的对手鬼混在了一起。毕竟雇佣兵船长的不都这样过活嘛，混得开赚大钱的都这样。

卢德左径 得知一名来自 Salamanca 联盟星球的著名研究员正搭乘 PLS Praxis 号正前往秘密地点参加会晤，届时他将和一名速子高管秘密签约。卢德左径 显然不会放过这次重创恶魔玛门的机会。

ISS Black Star 号在一小股 卢德左径 的打击力量的陪同下，穿过了一条让人吓破胆的超空间航路，艰难地尾随着 Praxis 号。它在 Duzakh 星系的 Druj 行星附近，且双方正进行人员交接的时候，突然遭遇了敌军部队。
context:
版本：0.98-RC8 词条格式：v2
源文件：data\missions\forthegreaterlud\mission_text.txt

original:
Location: In orbit around the forsaken world of Maxios
Date: 201.09.12

Callisto Ibrahim has accepted a six-month contract from a group of anonymous investors to lead a task-force with the mission to establish a base of salvage operations in Maxios orbit. 

Before the Collapse, Maxios was the dominant Domain charter colony of the Magec system. A barren but promising world, it was well-situated to grow into a center of culture and industry fueled by exploiting the vast resources available in Guayota's Disk, the voluminous torus of gas, ice, dust, and slowly accreting asteroids surrounding the primary. After the Collapse, investment ceased and the fragile ecosystem nurtured on Maxios choked and died as the terraformers and construction crews fled their stations. Now hab-towers stand dead witness over shining cities beaten into ruins by frequent meteor strikes. A few survivors remain: cranks, paranoid ideologues hiding in leaking bunkers, and outlaws who have largely devoured the merely sentimental. Nonetheless, much semi-functional technology and valuable refined metal and semi-smart material remains to be recovered by an expedition equipped with heavy salvage equipment.

The Magec system is not without civilization: surviving refugees and out-of-system exiles escaped into the Disk itself and converted a logistics depot into the asteroid-polity of New Maxios. They are a rugged folk, and Calliso Ibrahim is proud to count herself among them; practical, stubborn, and independent in equal measure. They do what is necessary to allow their re-created civil society to survive. Unfortunately the inner system is home to a large number of "undocumented salvage operations" and pirates, both freebooters and an entire brood descended from and loyal to the Kanta Dynasty. It is clear that either Kanta herself or someone on a high rung of her organization has taken offense at Ibrahim's salvage operation, for the usual in-fighting among the vultures has ceased and a distressingly large (though low-tech) cruiser has appeared on long-range sensors.

This, of course, was anticipated by the investors who have provided Ibrahim's expedition with state of the art combat vessels. However Ibrahim is not a seasoned tactician, merely an expert on logistics and salvage with a particular knack for inflating the significance of her previous combat experience - in the role of quartermaster, admittedly. Due to inexperience she is hard put to effectively command her forces in the sudden fury of space combat. If she can prevail, Callisto Ibrahim will indeed prove herself to be the tenacious battle-commander she claimed to be while impressing the investors' agent.
translation:
地点: 不毛之地 Maxios 的轨道附近
日期: 201.09.12

Callisto Ibrahim 接受了一份由匿名投资人团体提供的为期六个月的合同，负责领导一支特遣队在 Maxios 轨道上执行建立大型打捞作业基地的任务。

大崩塌前，Maxios 曾是 人之领 在 Magec 星系中最重要的特许殖民地，是一个虽然荒凉但却充满希望的世界。坐拥由气体云、冰尘和聚集的小行星围绕主星形成的 Guayota 吸积盘中的大量资源，它的地理位置优越，完全可以稳步发展为全星系的文化与产业中心。但是在大崩塌 后，随着投资戛然而止，地球化改造人员和建筑工人逃离岗位，Maxios 上脆弱的生态系统也因此惨遭扼杀。如今，星球死寂的居住高塔宛如墓碑般伫立，见证了曾经闪耀的都市被纷繁的陨石轰击化作废墟。仅有幸存者还留在此地：除了那些躲藏在破旧地堡中疯狂又偏执的意识形态狂热分子之外，就只有还在坚持把残存不多的人性搜刮殆尽的法外之徒了。尽管如此，对于配备了重型打捞设备的探险队来说，这里还有大量多半还能用的技术部件、珍贵的精炼金属和半智能材料等着去挖掘回收。

Magec 星系并未彻底失去文明：幸存的难民和来自系外的流亡者逃进了吸积盘内部，将一个后勤空间站改造成了名为 New Maxios 的小行星政体。他们是一群坚韧不拔的强人，务实、坚强、独立在他们身上均等并存，Callisto Ibrahim 也因自己能身为他们的一员而倍感自豪。为确保重建的公民社会能够生存下去，他们愿意赴汤蹈火，采取任何必要手段。然而不幸的是，大量所谓的 "无证打捞者" 和海盗在这个星系的内环安了家，既有游散掠夺者，亦有一支效忠于 Kanta 王朝血亲繁盛的匪帮。不管怎样，Kanta 她本人或是她组织内的海盗头目已经被 Ibrahim 的打捞作业给冒犯到了。秃鹫间平日的争食已经平息，一艘过时却庞大得令人不安的巡洋舰缓缓出现在远程传感器视野之中。

投资者当然预见了这种情况，因此才为 Ibrahim 配备了尖端战舰用于应对这种突发情况。然而 Ibrahim 并不是什么资深战术大师，只是一名在后勤与打捞方面的专家，但却特别喜欢吹嘘她的那些所谓的实战经历 —— 作为军需官参战的那些。倘若她真能克敌制胜，Callisto Ibrahim 便能证明自己所言不虚，不愧其坚韧的战场指挥官之名，并给投资者的代理人留下深刻印象。

源文件：data\missions\hornetsnest\mission_text.txt

original:
Location: Outskirts of the Selenius system
Date: 207.11.24

The player has the option not to deploy and risk the Gemini at all, or use it to draw away some enemy.  The Gemini is fairly tough - about half as tough as the Hammerhead - and can take on a single Lasher by itself without much trouble.  The main danger to the player comes from the Condor's torpedo tube.  If the Broadsword wing is allowed to refit, it can be dangerous too - and can wipe out the player's shields with the heavy MG easily if they're not careful.  The Talons and Lashers are just fodder that make pretty explosions.
translation:
地点: Selenius 星系外郊
日期: 207.11.24

玩家可以选择完全不部署双子座，也可以用它引开部分敌军。双子座还算坚韧 —— 其强度约为锤头的一半 —— 独自迎战一艘鞭笞者也问题不大。玩家的主要威胁来自秃鹰的鱼雷发射管。如果任由阔剑战机队完成整备，它们也会构成威胁 —— 稍有不慎，其搭载的重火力机枪便能轻易击溃玩家的护盾。剩下的利爪与鞭笞者不过是些用来放烟花的炮灰。
context:
版本：0.98-RC8 词条格式：v2
源文件：data\missions\m3\mission_text.txt

original:
Location: Near a secret Hegemony facility in the Tia-Tax'et system
Date: 193.07.21

It is not a routine survey expedition, but that's quite entirely the point.

The war raging between the Hegemony and Tri-Tachyon has filled nearby systems with the threat of opportunistic brigands and over-enthusiastic commerce raiders. Not that the distinction makes much difference, but the fact that the Galatia Academy can afford a heavy escort presents a unique opportunity: Some very old data makes certain implications that may lead to a largely intact Second Wave sporeship. Only the heavily-armed dare transit the war zone, so meddling merchants and surveyors will be discouraged from leaking the location of the search zone to a major faction (who are busy blasting each other to pieces right now, anyway).

Onboard the modified Venture-class cruiser housing the survey instruments, a junior operator centers the primary LIDAR reticle on asteroid b-473, confirms lock, then flings hot coffee over the supervising interferometric technician as a swarm of hostile warships explodes across the display.

***

The disastrous second engagement with Tri-Tachyon at the Duzakh system in which the HSS Bismar was destroyed provided the Hegemon Council with the political capital needed to press forward with sweeping emergency measures, enacting an expensive upgrade of Hegemony fleet armament and expanding the auxiliary lists with minimal complaint from the civilian governments. In a symbolic gesture, the hulk of the HSS Bismar was located, salvaged, and towed to the barren Tia-Tax'et system to be fitted with experimental weapons. It would be the spearpoint leading a thrust to strike at Tri-Tachyon's cold heart from a previously quiet front.   

Unfortunately just as the newly-christened HSS Phoenix was preparing for its proving flight, long-range sensors picked up a squadron of independent vessels surveying the Tia-Ta'xet system, sweeping the very asteroid field in which the secret Hegemony base was located. Hegemony SIGINT had long determined that all standard communication systems are infested by Tri-Tachyon backdoors, and while the Hegemony downgraded to clean protocols, it must be assumed that all Independents' systems are compromised, effectively acting as unknowing eyes and ears for the Tri-Tachyon corporation. 

The Hegemony commander feels the weight of history's judgment in his chest as he concludes the briefing, but knows what necessity demands. The Independents must be completely wiped out. No warning.

***

The academician-captain of the ISS Athena must leverage her ships' tactical maneuverability in a sudden, desperate fight for survival against a vastly superior Hegemony force.
translation:
地点: Tia-Tax'et 星系中的霸主秘密工厂附近
日期: 193.07.21

这不是什么日常科研调查 —— 而这就是问题的关键。

霸主 与 速子科技 之间肆虐的战争，导致附近星系中充满了伺机而动的海盗与过度热衷于劫掠商船的袭击者。尽管这两者间的界限并没有太大差别，但 Galatia 学院依旧负担得起一次难得的重装护航机会，因为此处有一个独特的契机：某些极古老的数据暗示此处可能存在着一艘大致完好无损的第二次扩张时期孢子母舰。只有全副武装的舰队才敢穿越战争区，所以即使是那些好事的商人和勘测员也无法把勘探区域的位置泄露给两大阵营 (反正现在他们正忙着把对方炸成碎片)。

一艘搭载测绘仪器的改装 历险-级 巡洋舰停靠于此，一名初级操作员将激光雷达标线对准小行星 B-473。确认-锁定，然后代表大波敌舰群的光点突然在屏幕上炸开，让他把手上滚烫的咖啡泼向监管干涉仪的技术员身上。

***

与 速子科技 在 Duzahk 星系灾难性的第二次战斗中，HSS Bismar 的击毁使 霸主议庭 得以依靠该政治资本，在受到市民政府最低限度抗议的情况下继续推进激进的应急措施，以获取昂贵的舰队装备升级并扩充军事化改装列表。而作为一个象征，HSS Bismar 的残骸被定位，并打捞拖回至贫瘠的 Tia-Tax'et 星系。等到为其装备上实验性武器后，它将作为矛头直指速子心脏。

不幸的是，已被重命名为 HSS Phoenix 的新战列舰正准备试航时，远程传感器检测到一支独立舰队正在 Tia-Ta'xet 星系执行勘测作业，而他们扫描的目标就是秘密工厂所在的小行星带。霸主 的通讯情报部门早就确定了所有标准通讯设备都染有速子的后门，虽然 霸主 以降级至落后设备的方式清理了系统，但为以防万一，必须假设那群独立舰队里的家伙没有这么做，他们很可能在无知中充当了速子的耳目。

这名 霸主 指挥官深感历史抉择的重任压向了他的胸口。他关闭了简报，但也做出了决定：无警告，灭口。

***

指挥 PLS Athena 的院士舰长必须在这场突如其来的殊死搏斗中，充分发挥她舰船的战术机动性，以求在占有压倒性优势的 霸主 兵力面前夺得一线生机。
context:
版本：0.98-RC8 词条格式：v2
源文件：data\missions\nothingpersonal\mission_text.txt

original:
Location: Inside the Atlantian Molecular Cloud
Date: 190.04.23

The TTS Ephemeral was en-route from the Tri-Tachyon military base on Culann to reinforce the blockade of the Valhalla system when news of the lifting of the siege of Raesvelg was received. This was a shock even to the Strategic Predictor, which could only offer "human factors" as an explanation for the oversight. Nonetheless, the Predictor had created a contingency plan for this result case and placed it in sealed orders for the Captain-Director of the Ephemeral. 

The Ephemeral reduces engine output to avoid detection and makes an abrupt course reversal.

By pure chance, a Hegemony long-range patrol detected the Ephemeral just before it re-entered the Atlantian Molecular Cloud. The patrol's is led by the tenacious Baikal Daud, who climbed his way up to a Hegemony command rank from the hive-slums of Chicomoztoc. He makes a gamble and plots an intercept course using the Ephemeral's last known trajectory as a guide for, in the words of the after-action report, "where *not* to look for the TriTach carrier".

Thinking Daud's patrol will be easy prey for his advanced vessels, the Captain-Director of the Ephemeral orders systems powered-up for combat maneuvers and deployment of all fighter wings. The distinctive high-energy sensor pattern of the mighty Astral carrier emerges suddenly from a bank of the molecular cloud on a course headed straight for the Hegemony patrol. 

It's time for a boy from the bottom of Chicomoztoc to show these shiny corporate princelings how to fight.
translation:
地点: Atlantian 分子云中
日期: 190.04.23

当收到 Raesvelg 解围的消息时，TTS Ephemeral 正在从 Culann 的军事基地到 Valhalla 星系的路上。连战略预测器都为之震惊，它只能将此次疏忽归结为 "人为因素" 方面的问题。不过预测器还是为这个结果制定了一个应急方案，并秘密地交给了 Ephemeral 的舰队长来执行。

Ephemeral 调低了其引擎出力来回避侦测，并借机突然改变了航线。

纯属偶然，一支 霸主 远程巡逻队在 Ephemeral 即将进入 Atlantian 分子云前侦测到了它。巡逻队长 Baikal Daud 是个从贫民窟奋斗上来而获得舰队指挥官一职的铁汉。现在他正进行一场豪赌，根据 Ephemeral 那一闪而过的雷达痕迹，以非常规的方案预判它的航线，并在那艘航母最不可能出现的位置上拦住了它。

倚仗其先进舰船，Ephemeral 的舰长认为 Daud 不堪一击，于是其命令激活作战系统，并部署所有战机。强大的 星体-级 航母爆发出清晰可见的高能传感反应从分子云中冲出，扑向了 霸主 的巡逻队。

是时候让这个从 Chicomoztoc 底层打拼出的大男孩指导这些白里透红的企业太子党如何战斗了。
context:
版本：0.98-RC8 词条格式：v2
源文件：data\missions\predatororprey\mission_text.txt

original:
Location: Somewhere in the Mediosolar Expanse
Date: Unknown

Helm a capital ship in this mission pitting two equally matched, randomly-generated fleets against each other.

Click on the mission in the list to re-roll the fleets.
translation:
地点: Mediosolar Expanse 中的某处
日期: 未知

在两支随机刷新且战力均衡的舰队之间一决雌雄。

单击列表中的任务名称来刷新舰队。

original:
Location: Somewhere between Druj and the Duzakh System fringe jump-point
Date: 193.03.14

Captain Gleise commands the HSS Bismar, Onslaught-class battleship, at the head of a task force sent to investigate what Hegemony SIGINT suspects is a Tri-Tachyon raider base on the otherwise barren world of Druj in the treacherous, radiation-swept Duzakh system. 

The intel about the base was, however, a plant by Tri-Tachyon agents designed to lead a much-needed Hegemony fleet, and Kane Gleise in particular, into a deadly trap.

The Tri-Tachyon profile on Kane Gleise describes a quiet man who led an equally quiet naval career which nearly ended when his escape pod was picked up by convoy-raiding mercenaries in the employ of Tri-Tachyon. Gleise was ransomed to the Tri-Tachyon Corporation then held for several years in a miserable prison-colony on the outskirts of the Hybrasil system. He was evaluated as mediocre enough a tactician to be handed back to the Hegemony in a prisoner exchange during one of the Second AI War's many ceasefire negotiations. But during his captivity it seems Gleise developed a cold hatred for the Tri-Tachyon Corporation; After his release, Gleise became forceful in demanding front-line combat assignments and his Hegemony psych profile began to contain worried notes, culminating in a somewhat gruesome incident after the capture of several high-ranking Tri-Tachyon executives. 

The event was classified by Hegemony intelligence. Gleise was promoted by the subsector's Space Marshal and given captainship of the HSS Bismar. It was thought that Gleise provided a certain selfless "lust for victory" that officers of the Hegemony could replicate. And so they did.

Unfortunately for Tri-Tachyon, Captain Gleise prevailed despite the advantage of surprise enjoyed by the Tri-Tachyon forces. The HSS Bismar sacrificed its escort to lock down and completely destroy two Tri-Tachyon cruisers before crippling a third in the final showdown.

However the Bismar's hyperdrive was damaged in the fighting and as it was limping toward the system's fringe jump-point under low power a Tri-Tachyon recon detachment escorting a supply ship stumbled upon Gleise's crippled battleship.

You command the TTS Chimera. It is now up to you to defeat the Butcher of Third Skathi before he can escape again.
translation:
地点: Druj 和 Duzakh 星系的边缘跳跃点之间的某处
日期: 193.03.14

舰长 Gleise 指挥的 HSS Bismar 攻势-级 战列舰正在执行一项特殊调查任务。霸主 的情报部门怀疑 Druj 这颗荒芜星球的附近藏有 速子科技 的劫掠基地，而它位于本应空无一物的高辐射 Duzakh 星系中。

然而，关于该基地的情报实为 速子科技 特工设下的圈套，旨在将一支 霸主 急需的舰队 —— 尤其是 Kane Gleise 所指挥的那支 —— 引入致命的陷阱。

速子数据库中 Kane Gleise 个人档案的描述是：一名有着平凡海军生涯且寡言少语的人，他的军旅生涯几乎在逃生舱被速子的商队劫掠佣兵找到时结束。在被 速子科技 抓获后，Gleise 于 Hybrasil 星系的外郊度过了数年的牢奴生活。在第二次 AI 战争的某次停火谈判中，他因被评为 "足够平庸的战术师" 而被选为交换囚犯，得以返回 霸主。但 速子科技 低估了他在被囚禁期间累积的巨大仇恨，获释后，Gleise 强硬地要求调往一线作战岗位，并在 霸主 心理档案留下了各种令人不安的极端检查记录，这一令人胆寒的因素在其俘获数名 速子科技 高管后发生的一起颇为骇人的血腥事件之中达到顶峰。

该事件被 霸主 情报部列为绝密。Gleise 却依然被空间元帅提拔，并被授予 HSS Bismar 舰长之职。军方认为，其无私的胜利欲望为 霸主 树立了良好的榜样，而他们确实这样参考了。

对 速子科技 来说非常不幸的是，虽诱饵与奇袭让他们大获优势，但 Gleise 依然成功突围。HSS Bismar 以牺牲护航力量为代价死咬并彻底摧毁了两艘速子巡洋舰，还在最终对决时重创了第三艘。

不过 Bismar 的超空间引擎已在战斗中损坏，当它在星系边缘跳跃点附近因低能源状态而举步维艰时，一支护送着一艘补给舰的速子快速反应分队偶然发现了它。

你指挥着 TTS Chimera。在 "Third Skathi 的屠夫" 再度逃脱之前，动手吧。
context:
版本：0.98-RC8 词条格式：v2
源文件：data\missions\sinkingthebismarck\mission_text.txt

original:
Location: Mayasura System
Date: 82.10.22

Many cycles ago, the Mayasura System was among the greatest and richest independent polities of the Sector. A center of culture and wealth, it stood as a wall against the spread of Hegemony influence both in the fact of its mighty fleets and as symbol of an independent path for future history to follow.

The crown of the Mayasura system was the triad of vast arcology-stations hanging above the world of Mairaath. Combined they housed tens of millions and formed the keystone of the terraforming project which transformed Mairaath into a paradise-world of fantastical transgenic re-imaginings of old-Earth biomes amidst bountiful fractal plains of robot-tended agriculture.

A fanatical sect of the Luddic Path pledged itself to destroy this great false idol. They organized a decades-long operation of subtle infiltration and sabotage.

On the chosen day, at the chosen hour, one station was rammed by an enormous Prometheus-class fuel carrier while, at the same, every safety system simultaneously engaged itself in an infinite reboot cycle. This station was cast from orbit on a bleeding tail of fusion fire crackling with radioactive dust.

One station was pushed by its own thrusters, slowly at first, but faster and faster and with gravity's dread inevitability it crashed to the surface of Mairaath. Lines of great destruction were scored upon the face of the world, mushrooming into cloud-banks of ash as firestorms raged and the carefully nurtured weather systems spasmed into extreme failure states from terraformers' nightmares.

The destruction attempt carried out upon the final station was a victim of its own chaos. This station remained in orbit, wounded and bleeding air, debris, and bodies out among the sparkling shredded membranes of solar mirrors.

Impotent, the bulk of the Mayasurian fleet stood vigil in orbit around the planet able to offer only token help to the dying population but unwilling to leave. When the Hegemony task force appears on the outskirts of the system, the fleet commander knows what they came to do and moves to block their path, determined to fight to the last. The experienced Commodore Jensulte in command of the Hegemony detachment is not about to take any chances and begins a methodical advance to erase the symbol of Mayasura alongside the fact.

* * * 

Your captains know what it is to lose everything and can be trusted to carry out your orders in the face of overwhelming odds.
translation:
地点: Mayasura 星系
日期: 82.10.22

多年前，Mayasura 星系联合体 曾是本星域最伟大且最富有的独立政体。作为文化与财富的中心，它不仅以庞大的舰队构筑起一道抵御 霸主 散布影响力的实体屏障，更象征着一条独立自主的历史演进之路。

Mayasura 星系的皇冠非 Mairaath 轨道上广阔而壮丽的三体生态空间站莫属。它们不仅安置了数以千万计的人民，还为生态化工程提供了坚固的基石，将 Mairaath 重塑为了一个天堂般的世界：对旧地球生物群落极具想象力的转基因重构产物在此繁盛，而广袤如分形般延展的丰饶农田则由机器人悉心照料。

狂热的 卢德左径 发誓要摧毁这座宏伟的伪神像。为此他们有组织地进行了长达数十年的渗透与破坏。

在计划好的那一天、那一刻，一艘巨大的 普罗米修斯-级 燃料舰撞向一个空间站，而同时，空间站上的每个安全保卫系统全部陷入了无限重启的失控。这个空间站最终拖着一条布满核闪光的放射性尘埃尾迹飞出了原轨道。

另一个空间站则是被自己的推进器驶离轨道。尽管刚开始异象非常微小，然而随着不断加速，它在星球引力那可怕且不可避免的牵引之下陷入了最后的绝望俯冲，直到坠入 Mairaath 的表面。巨大的破坏轨迹让星球表面变得满目疮痍，冲击扬起的灰烬云团如蘑菇般膨胀升腾，烈焰风暴肆虐不息，精心维系的人工气象系统骤然崩溃，陷入地貌改造者噩梦般的极端失效状态。

对第三座空间站发动的破坏行动，反被自身制造的混乱所吞噬。最终，这个伤痕累累的庞然大物依然留在轨道之上，不断地向外喷涌着空气、残骸和尸体，散落在太阳能镜面那破碎且闪烁的薄膜之间。

大多 Mayasura 舰队只能无力地守在轨道附近，向垂死的人群提供无济于事的援助，但他们不愿离去。当 霸主 特遣舰队现身于星系外郊时，舰队总指挥当然知道他们来此的目的，并毅然调转航向迎面拦下该舰队，决心血战至最后一舰。霸主 方面经验丰富的海军准将 Jensulte 则不容任何意外发生，开始有条不紊地抹去阻挡在前的 Mayasura 最后象征。

* * *

你的舰长们深知失去一切的滋味，即便身处绝境，也将恪守你的号令。
context:
版本：0.98-RC8 词条格式：v2
源文件：data\missions\thelasthurrah\mission_text.txt

original:
Location: Near midpoint of the Valhalla-Aztlan transit
Date: 189.11.07

Commander Kane Gleise was a taciturn man, never much good at talking to the right admiral at the right party to facilitate his climb up the career ladder. He did manage to catch the eye of the rear admiral in charge of the subsector's logistics, however it was only as a convenient body to fill a dull, unprestigious assignment. Dull, that is, until the Second AI War shattered the young peace.

The Tri-Tachyon megacorporation is a polity unto itself with influence and military might rivaling any of the great factions of the Sector. Defeated in the (now) First AI War, the megacorp appeared to accept the technological inspection terms imposed by the treaty (which, incidentally, won the Hegemony much support from its significant minority of Luddic faithful). Perfectly routine negotiations regarding perfectly mundane details of the regular inspections broke down as rapidly as if planned by the ruthless CEO Artemisia Sun. Threats were delivered alongside ultimatum; crisis erupted into war as Tri-Tachyon called the Hegemony's final bluff. 

Commander Gleise's convoy ships prime volatiles from the Raesvelg mines in the Valhalla system to feed the hungry industrial Core world of Chicomoztoc. The convoy is lightly defended as the Hegemony Navy scrambles to transfer escort flotillas from quiet hinterland tariff patrols to the sudden eruption of the Tri-Tachyon front.

Unfortunately, as history later revealed, Hegemony communications had been compromised from the start. Tri-Tachyon was the primary manufacturer of hyperwave communication hardware in the Sector and had left hidden backdoors in all systems.

The young sensors officer's voice cracked at the sudden appearance of enemy contacts: one, two, an entire pack of raiders burning hard with high-energy engines suggestive of the cream of Tri-Tachyon-supplied advanced weaponry. The enemy had known exactly where to lie in wait with powered-down systems. The situation thus dealt, all that matters is what is made of it: Commander Gleise, projecting calm to his green officers and crew, ordered battles stations.

You captain the lead mercenary raider, the Deimos. Disable as many of the Hegemony ships as you can before they escape so you and your crew can collect the generous bounties Tri-Tachyon has promised.
translation:
地点: Valhalla-Aztlan 运输中心附近
日期: 189.11.07

指挥官 Kane Gleise 是个沉默寡言的人，从来都不善于在恰当的聚会上结交恰当的长官，无法以此为他的晋升之路铺平台阶，但他确实成功引起了一位负责某片分区后勤的海军少将的注意，不过这仅仅是因为他是个方便填补枯燥无味、毫无声望的职位的人选。但这乏味的日常随着第二次 AI 战争的爆发而结束了。

拥有不俗影响力和军事实力的 速子科技 显然是个不输于任何势力的大政体。但在第一次 AI 战争中的失利，使得这一家巨企似乎接受了条约之中强加的科技审查条款，而这一条款还为 霸主 赢得了势力内少数卢德信徒的支持。然而，关于例行审查中那些再寻常不过的细节，本应平淡无奇的商议和拉扯却在某一日突然崩塌，节奏快得仿佛 速子科技 冷酷的首席执行官 Artemisia Sun 对此早有策划。尽管 霸主 已经正式向 速子科技 递交带有威胁意味的最后通牒，但仍被 速子科技 认为这只是虚张声势，于是危机爆发了。

Gleise 指挥的运输队携带有从 Valhalla 星系的 Raesvelg 矿井中开采出的挥发性原料，以用于支援资源紧缺的工业中心 Chicomoztoc 世界。由于速子科技前线战事的突然爆发，霸主海军正手忙脚乱地将护航分舰队从岁月静好的关税巡逻任务中抽调出来，这支运输队几乎没有配备护航的防御力量。

不幸的是，正如历史后来所揭示的那样，霸主 当时的通讯系统在一开始就已经被 速子科技 完全掌控。作为超波通讯系统硬件的首要制造商，速子科技 在它开发的所有系统里都留有后门。

年轻的观察员用惊恐的声音汇报了突然出现的敌人：一、二... 不！一整支劫掠舰队正开足高能引擎全速迫近，且其引擎的特征暗示着来者是 速子科技 提供的先进军备中的尖端型号。敌人们早已精确掌握了伏击坐标，并且关闭了系统在此静默潜伏。事已至此，只能设法应对：Gleise 向青涩的军官与船员们展现出了镇定自若的姿态，并下达了迎敌命令。

作为佣兵劫掠部队的领导者，Deimos 的舰长，你需要尽可能阻截想要逃跑的 霸主 舰队，只有这样你和你的船员才能获得 速子科技 许诺的丰厚赏金。
context:
版本：0.98-RC8 词条格式：v2
源文件：data\missions\thewolfpack\mission_text.txt

original:
Location: Jangala L-4 in the Corvus system
Date: 203.11.24

The independent prospector ISS Hamatsu has spent the last five weeks tech-mining on the decivilized world of New Maxios. The haul is good, the hold filled with stripped sheets of nanofactured smart materials, data matrices trailing I/O fibers, and several cores from what may well be forge-vat control units. The crew is ready for some R&R and the salvage team contractors eager to collect their share. Practical cynicism stoked by rumours of a Luddic Path cell operating in the local volume have led the Hamatsu's captain, seasoned combat-salvage veteran Callisto Ibrahim, to retain a mercenary ship with a particularly tenacious reputation for protection en route to buyers in the Core Worlds.

Ibrahim's worries were justified. Winding down from hyperspace at Jangala's L4 for a routine refueling stop in the Corvus system the ships are attacked by the very-real Luddic Path raiders. The Path blames technology for humanity's ills and consider it their sacred duty to prevent the Hamatsu and its high-tech cargo from reaching Hegemony space - or die trying.

After a brief conference, the captains of the Hamatsu and the mercenary ISS Black Star conclude that a direct assault offers the best chance of success - retreat is not viable as the Hamatsu is low on fuel.

The ISS Black Star is under your command. If you make it out of this alive, you might just be able to track down who it was that tipped off the Path.
translation:
地点: Corvus 星系的 Jangala L-4 附近
日期: 203.11.24

独自勘探的 ISS Hamatsu 已经在荒蛮的 新 Maxios 进行了近五周时间的技术挖掘作业，且收获颇丰。货舱已装满了剥离下来的纳米制造智能材料薄板、拖曳着 I/O 光纤的数据矩阵，以及数个疑似锻炉槽控制单元的核心组件。在船员们准备休息，且打捞小组的承包商等待着分得他们应得收益的时刻，一则关于 卢德左径 在周围活动的传言引起了舰长的应激反应。Hamatsu 的舰长 Callisto Ibrahim 是个在战斗与打捞方面都相当老练的人，她决定雇下一艘有着顽强作战美誉之称的舰船，以保护他们去核心星区会面买家。

Ibrahim 的担忧并非没有道理，当舰队脱离超空间，并在 Corvus 星系的 Jangala L-4 附近例行补充燃料时，他们就遭到了 卢德左径 劫掠者的袭击。这些狂热分子将人类的一切苦难归结于技术，因此阻止 Hamatsu 和它装载的高科技货物到达 霸主 那，是他们的神圣使命，为此他们甚至会毫不犹豫地付出自己的生命。

在简短商讨后，雇佣舰 ISS Black Star 和 Hamatsu 的舰长们达成了共识。Hamatsu 所剩燃料不多，撤退方案是不切实际的，因此只有直接发动攻击才有可能获得胜利。

ISS Black Star 由你指挥。只有活下来，你才能逮到那个走漏风声的内鬼。
context:
版本：0.98-RC8 词条格式：v2
源文件：data\missions\turningthetables\mission_text.txt
